message:
fix(ops): track connection worker panics and add timeout-safe join semantics

Extend TelemetryRuntimeHandle with connection worker panic tracking and
registry poisoning detection. Add join_connection_workers() method for
safe concurrent worker draining that transitions to Failed state on any
worker panic during join. Add mark_join_failed() for explicit failure
signaling when connection handles report panics.

- Add connection worker panic tracking via join handle inspection
- Add join_connection_workers() for safe concurrent draining
- Transition to Failed state on worker panic during join
- Improve graceful abort and timeout handling documentation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
